insights.title: Anomalies detected in data
insights.body: Anomaly alert (warning): 4 anomalies detected, 2 high severity

insights.title: Anomaly Alert - High Severity in Uttar Pradesh
insights.body: Two high severity anomalies detected, potentially impacting sales. Investigate the causes and implications for bitumen demand.

insights.title: Stable Market Sentiment - Opportunity Analysis
insights.body: Neutral market sentiment with stable trend suggests a consistent demand. Explore opportunities for sales growth in high-scoring states.

insights.title: Demand Peaks - Uttar Pradesh & Maharashtra Focus
insights.body: Uttar Pradesh and Maharashtra have the highest demand scores. Prioritize these states for sales initiatives.

insights.title: FX Rate Data Unavailable - Pricing Strategy Impacted
insights.body: Lack of current FX rates could affect international pricing strategies. Seek updated exchange rate information.
